title: Modification and Revision of a Sponsored Project Policy
display_label: Modification and Revision of a Sponsored Project
content: Governs requests to modify or revise an active sponsored project — including no-cost extensions, budget revisions, scope changes, change of PI, change of key personnel, and rebudgeting. Defines internal review and sponsor approval requirements before changes take effect. Compiled in PI Handbook 5 (effective 2024-07-01). Full policy details in PI Handbook 5.
